news.title: Himachal economy to grow at 8.3% in 2025-26 despite financial constraints
news.description: Tabling the Economic Survey 2025–26 in the Vidhan Sabha, Sukhu said the state’s per capita income (PCI), at current prices, is estimated at Rs 2,83,626 for the FY 2025–26, up from Rs 2,58,196 in 2024–25, marking a growth of 9.8 per cent.

news.title: LPG shortage forces Himachal Assembly kitchens to switch to wood-fired stoves
